title: Add validation tests for schema, risk leakage and compatibility
description: Add focused unittest coverage for the new blind-box content model and legacy compatibility. Follow the existing importlib-based test style in Game content extraction/test_*.py and avoid UI automation.
convergence: Tests assert five-layer schema completeness for pilot categories.
Tests assert blocked_or_risky entries do not appear in large/medium/small/hanging.
Tests assert legacy BLIND_BOXES entries keep name, large, medium, small, hanging.
Tests assert old input override labels still parse.
python -B -m unittest discover -s 'Game content extraction' -p 'test_*.py' passes.
